creator: asami@cs.berkeley.edu
text:
I have taken a look at your port, and have it almost ready to commit.
I put it in ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/slnr-port3.tar.gz.
(The Makefile is much shorter!)

One thing I don't understand, though, is the use of default.dot.* that 
you supply in the files/ dir.  They don't get installed, even as an
example.  Are these necessary?  (If so, I'll have to do something with 
the default signature, because it's YOURS! :)

Satoshi
